sections.headline: Cool again today.

stat.label: the comfort we bring a sweltering Miami home back down to

sections.heading: Don't sweat through another night
items: In Miami heat, a dead AC makes a home unlivable in hours — for kids, pets, and anyone working from home.
A small fault left alone becomes a compressor-killing, wallet-emptying breakdown.
Wait too long and you're forced into a rushed, full-price replacement.
Sleepless, sweating nights you shouldn't have to put up with.

sections.heading: Relief, fast — without the upsell or the upfront sting

items.body: Most AC problems diagnosed and fixed the same day you call.

items.title: Honest diagnosis first
items.body: We find the real fault and explain repair vs. replace before any work — no pressure.

items.title: $0 down if you need a new system
items.body: Financing with approval in minutes, all credit backgrounds, so cost isn't the reason you wait in the heat.

sections.heading: Miami's heat is relentless. So are we.
sections.empathy: When the AC dies down here, every hour feels longer. We treat it like the emergency it is — fast, certified, and straight with you.

flags: TEST BUILD — recreation of a third-party site to exercise the design-taste gate; not a real customer onboarding.

Service area beyond 'Miami' (exact cities/counties), regular business hours, street address, email, FL HVAC license #, specific certifications, years in business, and reviews/ratings were NOT verifiable and are omitted — not invented.
No testimonials on the source site — proof section intentionally omitted; do not fabricate reviews.
All colors and fonts are un-briefed aesthetic assumptions (source site stated none); confirm against any real brand.
Hero/section imagery is representative license-clean stock (Pexels to Cloudinary), not real photos of this business or its employees.
Online booking is a flagged placeholder (no booking system on source); CTA is tel: only.
Lender/financing terms and any maintenance-plan terms are unconfirmed; copy avoids specific promises.
